title: prangos longistylis
intro: Prangos longistylis, also known as Ferula longistylis, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin infections, due to its health benefits such as improving digestion, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Prangos longistylis include essential oils, extracts, and powders, which can be used in traditional medicine, aromatherapy, and skincare products.
